queries.description: Total revenue, payment count, and average payment amount by currency — helps understand the financial scale and mix across different currencies
queries.sql:
-- Revenue breakdown by currency
SELECT
  p.currency,
  COUNT(p.id) AS total_payments,
  SUM(p.amount) AS total_revenue,
  AVG(p.amount) AS avg_payment_amount,
  MIN(p.amount) AS min_payment,
  MAX(p.amount) AS max_payment
FROM payments p
GROUP BY p.currency
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

queries.description: Monthly payment volume and revenue trend — identifies growth patterns and seasonal fluctuations over time
queries.sql:
-- Monthly payment volume and revenue trend
SELECT
  DATE_FORMAT(p.created_at, '%Y-%m') AS month,
  COUNT(p.id) AS payment_count,
  SUM(p.amount) AS total_revenue,
  AVG(p.amount) AS avg_payment_amount
FROM payments p
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(p.created_at, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month ASC

queries.description: Top 10 organisations by total payment revenue — highlights the highest-value customers driving the most income
queries.sql:
-- Top 10 organisations by total payment revenue
SELECT
  o.id AS organisation_id,
  o.parent_vertical,
  COUNT(p.id) AS total_payments,
  SUM(p.amount) AS total_revenue,
  AVG(p.amount) AS avg_payment_amount
FROM organisations o
JOIN mandates m ON m.organisation_id = o.id
JOIN payments p ON p.mandate_id = m.id
GROUP BY o.id, o.parent_vertical
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

queries.description: Payment volume and revenue by industry vertical — shows which verticals contribute most to the business
queries.sql:
-- Payment volume and revenue by parent vertical
SELECT
  o.parent_vertical,
  COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) AS organisation_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) AS mandate_count,
  COUNT(p.id) AS total_payments,
  SUM(p.amount) AS total_revenue,
  AVG(p.amount) AS avg_payment_amount
FROM organisations o
JOIN mandates m ON m.organisation_id = o.id
JOIN payments p ON p.mandate_id = m.id
GROUP BY o.parent_vertical
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

queries.description: Mandate activity summary by scheme — reveals which payment schemes are most widely used and generate the most transactions
queries.sql:
-- Mandate and payment activity broken down by scheme
SELECT
  m.scheme,
  COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) AS total_mandates,
  COUNT(DISTINCT m.organisation_id) AS organisations_using_scheme,
  COUNT(p.id) AS total_payments,
  SUM(p.amount) AS total_revenue,
  AVG(p.amount) AS avg_payment_amount
FROM mandates m
LEFT JOIN payments p ON p.mandate_id = m.id
GROUP BY m.scheme
ORDER BY total_payments DESC

queries.description: Payment source performance comparison — determines which payment sources (e.g. API, dashboard) drive the most volume and revenue
queries.sql:
-- Payment volume and revenue by payment source
SELECT
  p.source,
  COUNT(p.id) AS total_payments,
  SUM(p.amount) AS total_revenue,
  AVG(p.amount) AS avg_payment_amount,
  MIN(p.amount) AS min_payment,
  MAX(p.amount) AS max_payment
FROM payments p
GROUP BY p.source
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

queries.description: Average days between payment creation and charge date by vertical — measures collection lag and helps optimise cash flow timing
queries.sql:
-- Average lag between payment creation and charge date by vertical
SELECT
  o.parent_vertical,
  COUNT(p.id) AS total_payments,
  AVG(DATEDIFF(p.charge_date, p.created_at)) AS avg_days_to_charge,
  MIN(DATEDIFF(p.charge_date, p.created_at)) AS min_days_to_charge,
  MAX(DATEDIFF(p.charge_date, p.created_at)) AS max_days_to_charge
FROM payments p
JOIN mandates m ON m.id = p.mandate_id
JOIN organisations o ON o.id = m.organisation_id
WHERE p.charge_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.parent_vertical
ORDER BY avg_days_to_charge DESC

queries.description: Organisation cohort analysis by signup month — tracks how many organisations joined each month and their cumulative mandate and payment activity
queries.sql:
-- Organisation cohort: signups per month with mandate and payment counts
SELECT
  DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m') AS signup_month,
  COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) AS new_organisations,
  COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) AS mandates_created,
  COUNT(p.id) AS payments_made,
  SUM(p.amount) AS total_revenue
FROM organisations o
LEFT JOIN mandates m ON m.organisation_id = o.id
LEFT JOIN payments p ON p.mandate_id = m.id
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY signup_month ASC
